about.name: Zono
about.title: Software Engineer
about.introText: Hello! I'm Zono, a software engineer focused on web development. I specialize in frontend development using TypeScript and React. In this blog, I share technical insights and daily learnings.
about.careerItem1Description: Engaged in web application development. Responsible for both frontend and backend development.
about.careerItem2Description: Responsible for website development and system development.
